notes: Generated at the end of runningKeyboard.test.ts during vitest.
This suite validates immediate key routing and intentionally has no plotter image snapshots.
consoleLines: [test] running keyboard handler > applies arrow keys immediately through keyState
[test] running keyboard handler > queues Enter immediately and also updates enter key state
[test] running keyboard handler > queues printable and control keys immediately
[test] running keyboard handler > ignores modified shortcuts so browser/app shortcuts keep working
[test] running keyboard handler > does not hijack typing inside editable DOM targets
